secretaryOfState.agency: North Dakota Secretary of State - Business Services

physicalAddresses.label: Office of the Secretary of State

renewals.notes: Most North Dakota business registrations and maintenance filings, including annual reports, are completed through the FirstStop Portal. Business LLC annual reports are due November 15.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Registration fee for domestic and foreign business LLCs.
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Official guidance says a reserved name application is filed through the FirstStop Portal and reserves a name for up to 1 year; no separate fee amount was published on the reviewed public page.
